lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another shield?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I'm Sir Rebral of the White Knights and taskmaster for the Falador Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Falador and the surrounding area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: reward you.

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Falador and the surrounding area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: reward you.

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: Well, there are four different shields of Falador, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Falador, the shield can restore one quarter of your prayer points once per day and you can access a shortcut to the Chaos temple from Burthorpe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, the shield can restore half of your prayer points once per day and provides a 10% experience boost at Falador farm. You'll get an increased chance of finding a clue scroll from a Guard

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: and can access a shortcut within the Motherlode Mine

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, the shield will restore all of your prayer points once per day, you can access a bank deposit box at the crafting guild and a shortcut to the Heroes' Guild fountain. The Giant

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: mole becomes much easier to locate and it will drop noted skins and claws.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, the tree patch in Falador park will never become diseased and the shield will restore all of your prayer points twice per day in addition to an increased chance at higher level

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: ores from cleaning Pay-dirt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in the Falador area so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Falador Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: This shield is a symbol of your exploration of Falador. It can restore one quarter of your prayer points once per day and you can now access a shortcut to the Chaos temple from Burthorpe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: If you ever lose your shield, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Falador achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I've upgraded your Falador shield for you. It can restore half of your prayer points once per day and provides a 10% experience boost at Falador farm. You've got an increased chance of finding a clue scroll

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: from a Guard and can access a shortcut within the Motherlode Mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Falador achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I've upgraded your Falador shield for you. It will restore all of your prayer points once per day, you can now access a bank deposit box at the crafting guild and a shortcut to the Heroes' Guild fountain. The Giant

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: mole should now be easier to locate and it will drop noted skins and claws.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Falador achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Falador! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: I've upgraded your Falador shield for you. The tree patch in Falador park will now never become diseased and the shield will restore all of your prayer points twice per day in addition to an increased chance at

lines.speaker: Sir Rebral
lines.text: higher level ores from cleaning Pay-dirt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
